name: Bottled Catharsis (Lesser)
description:
Activate (1 Action) (manipulate)

This drink unlocks a flood of emotions that helps reset your mental state. When you drink this elixir, the elixir attempts to counteract at 2nd-rank and has a +8 counteract modifier each effect on you that has the emotion trait or is inflicting the Stupefied condition on you, using the listed counteract rank and modifier.
